recommendations.title: The Sting
recommendations.overview: A novice con man teams up with an acknowledged master to avenge the murder of a mutual friend by pulling off the ultimate big con and swindling a fortune from a big-time mobster.

recommendations.title: Slap Shot
recommendations.overview: To build up attendance at their games, the management of a struggling minor-league hockey team signs up the Hanson Brothers, three hard-charging players whose job is to demolish the opposition.

recommendations.title: Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid
recommendations.overview: As the west rapidly becomes civilized, a pair of outlaws in 1890s Wyoming find themselves pursued by a posse and decide to flee to South America in hopes of evading the law.

recommendations.title: Funny Farm
recommendations.overview: Sportswriter Andy Farmer moves with his schoolteacher wife Elizabeth to the country in order to write a novel in relative seclusion. Of course, seclusion is the last thing the Farmers find in the small, eccentric town, where disaster awaits them at e

recommendations.title: Slaughterhouse-Five
recommendations.overview: Billy Pilgrim, a veteran of the Second World War, finds himself mysteriously detached from time, so that he is able to travel, without being able to help it, from the days of his childhood to those of his peculiar life on a distant planet called Tral

recommendations.title: Tootsie
recommendations.overview: When struggling, out of work actor Michael Dorsey secretly adopts a female alter ego – Dorothy Michaels – in order to land a part in a daytime drama, he unwittingly becomes a feminist icon and ends up in a romantic pickle.

recommendations.title: Whisper of the Heart
recommendations.overview: Shizuku lives a simple life, dominated by her love for stories and writing. One day she notices that all the library books she has have been previously checked out by the same person: "Seiji Amasawa."

recommendations.title: La Notte
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of an unfaithful married couple and their steadily deteriorating relationship in Milan.

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: Super Deluxe
recommendations.overview: An unfaithful newly-wed wife, an estranged parent, a priest and an angry son suddenly find themselves in the most unexpected predicaments, each poised to experience their destiny, all on one fateful day.
